title: galium rotundifolium subsp. ovalifolium
intro: Galium rotundifolium subsp. ovalifolium, also known as Round-leaved Bedstraw, is a perennial plant species within the Galium genus. It has been used for centuries in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, particularly as an anti-inflammatory and antiseptic agent, due to its high concentration of flavonoids and phenolic compounds. The health benefits of Galium rotundifolium subsp. ovalifolium include its ability to reduce fever, alleviate digestive issues, and provide relief from pain and inflammation. Herbal preparations of this plant can be made into teas, infusions, or tinctures, which are often used to treat a range of health issues, from colds and flu to menstrual disorders and skin conditions.
